items.claim: DDP's fighting style is highly adaptive and relies on exploiting the specific weaknesses of his opponent.
items.quote: his entire style really depends on the weaknesses of his opponent. He's very willing to completely change things up depending on who he's fighting.

items.claim: DDP utilizes an awkward technique of chaining combinations into takedowns by falling into his opponents.
items.quote: He'll chain his combinations into takedowns in an awkward way where he kind of just falls into his opponent

items.claim: DDP is susceptible to being taken down or countered due to his erratic fighting style.
items.quote: Because his style is a little bit erratic, he definitely can be taken down or countered fairly easily at times

items.claim: Usman's striking game is primarily reliant on his jab.
items.quote: The majority of his striking game really is his jab in all honesty.

items.claim: Usman's striking ability has degraded, showing less nuance and defensive soundness.
items.quote: His striking really seems to have degraded a lot. There's no real nuance now, and he's not as defensively sound.

items.claim: Usman struggles when he cannot impose his own pace and faces a chaotic opponent.
items.quote: an issue that Usman has always had throughout his career is that he really struggles when he cannot impose his own pace and his opponent is willing to be chaotic.

items.claim: Usman is easier to hit now because he is no longer comfortable pushing a constant pace.
items.quote: Since he's not comfortable just pushing the pace constantly now, it's definitely gotten easier for opponents to hit him
